San Marino GDP per capita

Current value · 2023
55,379
EUR
+7.6%vs 2022
Historical min
37,318
2012
Historical max
55,379
2023
Data period
1999–2023

San Marino's GDP per capita stood at approximately €52,189 in 2023, placing the Republic among the highest-income economies in Europe. The figure reflects a highly productive economy with a skilled workforce and a developed financial services sector.

Historical series · EUR · 1999–2023
Source: World Bank ↗

25 observations · updated 2026-03-23 · CC BY 4.0
Source & methodology
Primary source
World Bank ↗Series: NY.GDP.PCAP.CD
Last updated
2026-03-23
Methodology

GDP per capita calculated as the GDP/average annual resident population ratio. Converted from USD to EUR. The World Bank methodology uses the official resident population estimate provided by the San Marino Statistical Office.

EUR conversion

Original values in USD (NY.GDP.PCAP.CD), converted to EUR using annual average ECB exchange rates.

For corrections or data issues: info@oesm.net
